TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: u Mauri (MńĀori) hananay a binacadan i niwsilan nanay kakitidaan a yincumin, nu makay timulan a subal nakamuwan. u cuwacuwaay a binacadan nayi' ku idaway nu sulit, 1840 a mihcaan itawya malingatu pasulit tunu latin u sasakamuwan nu kaduuday a binacadan, u sakangaayay nu binacadan i labuay nu balucu' sakayadahay nu kakawsan sakangaay nu balucu'. Mauri hanay i Mauri nakamuwan sakasaan pasakamu tadengaay atu sakatadengaay a tademaw, hinasaan ku Mauri a tademaw, idaw ku sasaydan pasakamu saan u Mauri a binacadan atu mamin nataw a binacadan, saayaway a nikakititaan sakabaat makakatukuh i taywan a niyadu'. u kamu nu Mauri hanay a binacadan atu lalangawan atu makaysumamaday a tuudtuud misasengi u yincumin hananay a binacadan u kamu. u sausi nu Mauri a tademaw mapulung idaw ku pituay a bataan ku emang, u kamu nu maori u sasakamuwan nu cenhu. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamu atu matineng śĮõŚą©šļļ
S.PHON: u mauri (m*ori) ńßananaj a bina ¶adan i niwsir~…ĺan nanaj kakitidaan a jin ¶umin, nu makaj timur~…ĺan a subar~…ĺ nakamuwan. u ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a bina ¶adan naji Ē~ ° ku idawaj nu sur~…ĺit, **** a mińß ¶aan itawja mar~…ĺiŇčatu pasur~…ĺit tunu r~…ĺatin u sasakamuwan nu kaduudaj a bina ¶adan, u sakaŇčaajaj nu bina ¶adan i r~…ĺabuaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° sakajadańßaj nu kakawsan sakaŇčaaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. mauri ńßanaj i mauri nakamuwan sakasaan pasakamu tad…ôŇčaaj atu sakatad…ôŇčaaj a tad…ômaw, ńßinasaan ku mauri a tad…ômaw, idaw ku sasajdan pasakamu saan u mauri a bina ¶adan atu mamin nataw a bina ¶adan, saajawaj a nikakititaan sakabaat makakatukuńß i tajwan a nijadu Ē~ °. u kamu nu mauri ńßanaj a bina ¶adan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu makajsumamadaj a tuudtuud misas…ôŇči u jin ¶umin ńßananaj a bina ¶adan u kamu. u sausi nu mauri a tad…ômaw mapur~…ĺuŇč idaw ku pituaj a bataan ku …ômaŇč, u kamu nu maori u sasakamuwan nu ¶…ônńßu. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamu atu matin…ôŇč ***
S.FORM: u Mauri (MńĀori) hananay a binacadan i niwsilan nanay kakitidaan a yincumin, nu makay timulan a subal nakamuwan. u cuwacuwaay a binacadan nayi' ku idaway nu sulit, 1840 a mihcaan itawya malingatu pasulit tunu latin u sasakamuwan nu kaduuday a binacadan, u sakangaayay nu binacadan i labuay nu balucu' sakayadahay nu kakawsan sakangaay nu balucu'. Mauri hanay i Mauri nakamuwan sakasaan pasakamu tadengaay atu sakatadengaay a tademaw, hinasaan ku Mauri a tademaw, idaw ku sasaydan pasakamu saan u Mauri a binacadan atu mamin nataw a binacadan, saayaway a nikakititaan sakabaat makakatukuh i taywan a niyadu'. u kamu nu Mauri hanay a binacadan atu lalangawan atu makaysumamaday a tuudtuud misasengi u yincumin hananay a binacadan u kamu. u sausi nu Mauri a tademaw mapulung idaw ku pituay a bataan ku emang, u kamu nu maori u sasakamuwan nu cenhu. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamu atu matineng śĮõŚą©šļļ
S.PHON: u mauri (m*ori) ńßananaj a bina ¶adan i niwsir~…ĺan nanaj kakitidaan a jin ¶umin, nu makaj timur~…ĺan a subar~…ĺ nakamuwan. u ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a bina ¶adan naji Ē~ ° ku idawaj nu sur~…ĺit, **** a mińß ¶aan itawja mar~…ĺiŇčatu pasur~…ĺit tunu r~…ĺatin u sasakamuwan nu kaduudaj a bina ¶adan, u sakaŇčaajaj nu bina ¶adan i r~…ĺabuaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° sakajadańßaj nu kakawsan sakaŇčaaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. mauri ńßanaj i mauri nakamuwan sakasaan pasakamu tad…ôŇčaaj atu sakatad…ôŇčaaj a tad…ômaw, ńßinasaan ku mauri a tad…ômaw, idaw ku sasajdan pasakamu saan u mauri a bina ¶adan atu mamin nataw a bina ¶adan, saajawaj a nikakititaan sakabaat makakatukuńß i tajwan a nijadu Ē~ °. u kamu nu mauri ńßanaj a bina ¶adan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu makajsumamadaj a tuudtuud misas…ôŇči u jin ¶umin ńßananaj a bina ¶adan u kamu. u sausi nu mauri a tad…ômaw mapur~…ĺuŇč idaw ku pituaj a bataan ku …ômaŇč, u kamu nu maori u sasakamuwan nu ¶…ônńßu. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamu atu matin…ôŇč ***
